view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm the existence of such an interface or its functionality. While there are successful booking transactions, there is no direct evidence indicating that the mini booking interface operates as required within the Instagram or Facebook platforms, leading to an inconclusive status.
